positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for monkeypox_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    monkeypox != flu).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    tiredness != flu).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    monkeypox != monkeypox_virus).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define is_mammal(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define is_human(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define has_virus(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define gets_disease(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_symptom(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define gets_flu(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define feels_tired(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
